title: festuca rubra var. magnelii
intro: Festuca rubra var. magnelii, also known as red fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Festuca rubra var. magnelii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders and other health issues.
